cases.description: Adding a custom rule triggers the skill
cases.prompt: add a new rule named my-coding-standard
expectations: Creates a blank skeleton with managed_by: user

cases.description: Conflict resolution on `codi generate` exit 2 triggers the skill
cases.prompt: `codi generate` just exited with code 2 and printed a conflicts JSON
expectations: Activates dev-operations skill Conflict Resolution flow
Parses the JSON payload from stdout
Offers Path A (agent merges) or Path B (manual with conflict markers)
Does NOT expose raw JSON or exit code to the user

cases.description: Source-layer edit triggers the clean+reinstall flow
cases.prompt: I edited src/templates/skills/my-skill/template.ts but `codi generate` didn't pick up the change
expectations: Explains that `codi generate` reads .codi/, not src/templates/
Walks through pnpm build → rm -rf .codi/skills/codi-my-skill → delete artifact-manifest entry → codi add skill --template → codi generate --force
Reminds user to bump `version:` in the template frontmatter

cases.prompt: check if my Codi setup has drift

cases.description: Writing a new skill does NOT trigger dev-operations
cases.prompt: help me write a new skill that wraps the OpenAI SDK
expectations: Does NOT run `codi add skill` first without the skill-creator workflow
